description_long: This is a modern suburban house with a light-colored exterior, featuring a combination of flat and gable roofs. The property includes a spacious backyard with a rectangular swimming pool, a paved patio area, and several mature trees providing shade. The house has multiple large windows, some of which are floor-to-ceiling, allowing for ample natural light. The front facade is symmetrical, with two prominent garage structures flanking the main entrance, which is set back and features a small overhang. The backyard is enclosed by a fence, and there is a driveway leading to the garages. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with an emphasis on outdoor living and open space.
description: A modern, light-colored suburban house with flat and gable roofs, large windows, garages, and a backyard featuring a pool and patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical facade, two garages, main entrance, and trees lining the property.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the swimming pool, patio area, and the driveway leading to the garages.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, pool, patio, trees, and the fenced perimeter.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool, patio, and the side elevation of the house with large windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central recessed entry with a small overhang, flanked by garages, and a paved approach
